id.description: Unique identifier for a combination of table and data field

dataItemId.description: Unique identifier for the data item

dataType.description: Data type of the data field

position.description: Column position of the data field within the table

isPrimaryKey.description: Flag indicating if the data field is a primary key.

nullable.description: Flag indicating if a data field is nullable

hasCodeDependency.description: Flag indicating if the field's value is determined by a code value in its row. The monetary, splitAffected and unitFactor fields for that value will also be inherited from the code.

monetary.description: Flag indicating if the data field contained in this TableField is monetary. If true, this field can have exchange rates applied to convert to other currencies

splitAffected.description: Flag indicating if the data field contained in this TableField can be affected by splits

unitFactor.description: Factor to indicate what units that the data field is displayed in. If null, the field does not need to have a factor applied to obtain the real value

description.description: A description of the data field within the context of its table
